ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "time" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades for the day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price reached during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price reached during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "foreign_net_volume" INTEGER /* Net volume of trades by foreign investors */,
  "domestic_net_volume" INTEGER /* Net volume of trades by domestic investors */,
  "net_margin" REAL /* Net margin calculated for the day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading day (e.g., open, closed, halted) */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stock details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the exchange was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the exchange */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the industry details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the sector details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the report was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version of the model used for prediction */,
  "actual_price" REAL /* Actual price of the stock on the prediction date */,
  "error" REAL /* Difference between the predicted and actual price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the prediction was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_version FOREIGN KEY ("model_version") REFERENCES models ("model_version")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_data_period" TEXT /* Period of training data used (e.g., 2010-2020) */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Last time the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Potential impact on the stock price (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the portfolio details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock mapping */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the portfolio stock details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
